## Downloads

Pick the package for your platform and run the installer/app.

- `Producer-Player-<version>-mac-universal.zip` — macOS (Universal: Apple Silicon + Intel)
- `Producer-Player-<version>-linux-x64.AppImage` — Linux AppImage (recommended; self-updating)
- `Producer-Player-<version>-linux-x64.deb` — Linux Debian/Ubuntu package
- `Producer-Player-<version>-linux-x64.zip` — Linux portable ZIP fallback
- `Producer-Player-<version>-win-x64.exe` — Windows installer (NSIS)

Checksum files (`.sha256`) are included for verification.

## Install

- **macOS:** Unzip and move `Producer Player.app` into `/Applications`.
- **Linux:** Prefer the AppImage: make it executable (`chmod +x Producer-Player-<version>-linux-x64.AppImage`) and run it. Debian/Ubuntu users can install the `.deb`; the ZIP is a portable fallback and does not self-update.
- **Windows:** Run the installer and follow the setup wizard.
